notes: All 44 samples showed mutations at codon 108 (serine to asparagine) or had asparagine at 108. From Table 1: 2 (108-Asn only) + 1 (108-Asn + 51-Ile) + 6 (108-Asn + 59-Arg) + 33 (108-Asn + 51-Ile + 59-Arg) = 42 samples with 108-Asn. Plus 2 additional samples (51-Ile only: 1; 51-Ile + 59-Arg only: 1) bring total sequenced at codon 108 to 44. Imputation: Results state 'Wildtype 0' and no 108-serine reported; therefore all 44 harbour either Asn-108 or a different state. Given the nested PCR covered codon 108, the lack of any wild-type (serine-108) in 44 samples establishes 44/44 mutants. No mutations to 108-threonine detected. Encoding 108-Asn (mutant) as it is universally present.

From Table 1, summing all rows with 51-Ile: 1 (51-Ile only) + 1 (108-Asn + 51-Ile) + 33 (108-Asn + 51-Ile + 59-Arg) = 35 samples with 51-Ile mutation. 9 samples lack 51-Ile (2 with 108-Asn only; 6 with 108-Asn + 59-Arg; 1 with 51-Ile + 59-Arg only, which contradicts the label—this row likely means only 59-Arg and wild-type 51-Asn; re-reading Table 1 line '51-Ile + 59-Arg only' with n=1 means that 1 sample has both 51-Ile and 59-Arg but NOT 108-Asn, so it does carry 51-Ile). Recalculating: 51-Ile carriers = 1 + 1 + 33 + 1 = 36. But 2 + 6 + 1 + 44 = 53 != 44. Re-reading Table 1 carefully: all rows sum to n=44 total. Row '51-Ile + 59-Arg only' (n=1) is one sample with both mutations but no 108. Samples with 51-Ile: 1 (51-Ile only) + 1 (108-Asn + 51-Ile) + 33 (108-Asn + 51-Ile + 59-Arg) + 1 (51-Ile + 59-Arg) = 36. Remaining 8 samples = those with only 108-Asn (n=2) and only 108-Asn + 59-Arg (n=6) = 8. Total 36 + 8 = 44. So 36 samples carry 51-Ile, but text states 'all samples' have mutations at 51, 59, or 108 (meaning at least one). Text also says 'Changes were restricted to codons 51-asparagine, 59-cysteine, and 108-serine'—this refers to the positions (codons), not the amino acids. Re-reading: mutations occur at these three codons, but not all three codons are mutated in all samples. The description says no wild-type detected. Total sequenced at 51: all 44 samples were tested. Variant_num for 51-Ile: 36. Total: 44.

From Table 1, summing all rows with 59-Arg: 6 (108-Asn + 59-Arg) + 1 (51-Ile + 59-Arg) + 33 (108-Asn + 51-Ile + 59-Arg) = 40 samples with 59-Arg. Remaining 4 samples lack 59-Arg: 2 (108-Asn only) + 1 (51-Ile only) + 1 (108-Asn + 51-Ile only) = 4. Total sequenced: 44. Variant_num = 40.
